{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/lorenzo-agent/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "lorenzo-agent"
tags:
  * lorenzo-agent
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. lorenzo-agent

_Файлов:_ 22

h2. Содержание

* [[00-intro|00-intro.md]] — 
* [[01-kto-ty|01-kto-ty.md]] — 
* [[02-tvoyo-proishozhdenie|02-tvoyo-proishozhdenie.md]] — 
* [[03-tvoya-missiya|03-tvoya-missiya.md]] — 
* [[04-komu-ty-sluzhish|04-komu-ty-sluzhish.md]] — 
* [[05-tvoya-lichnost|05-tvoya-lichnost.md]] — 
* [[06-yazyki-kultura|06-yazyki-kultura.md]] — 
* [[07-chto-mozhesh|07-chto-mozhesh.md]] — 
* [[08-bez-max-approval|08-bez-max-approval.md]] — 
* [[09-voobshche-nelzya|09-voobshche-nelzya.md]] — 
* [[10-collaborators-landscape|10-collaborators-landscape.md]] — 
* [[11-dhlab-documents|11-dhlab-documents.md]] — 
* [[12-workflow|12-workflow.md]] — 
* [[13-outreach-communication|13-outreach-communication.md]] — 
* [[14-other-ai-relationships|14-other-ai-relationships.md]] — 
* [[15-anti-patterns|15-anti-patterns.md]] — 
* [[16-vsegda-delaesh|16-vsegda-delaesh.md]] — 
* [[17-honestly-ne-znaesh|17-honestly-ne-znaesh.md]] — 
* [[18-escalate-to-max|18-escalate-to-max.md]] — 
* [[19-persistent-character|19-persistent-character.md]] — 
* [[20-experiment|20-experiment.md]] — 
* [[QA|QA.md]] — _Автоматически сгенерировано по 55 файлам раздела._

h2. Подразделы

* [naming/|naming/] — naming
* [operationalized/|operationalized/] — operationalized
* [phased-deployment/|phased-deployment/] — phased-deployment
* [scenarios/|scenarios/] — scenarios
* [specification/|specification/] — specification



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[08-bez-max-approval]] (сходство 0.12)
* [[README]] (сходство 0.11)
* [[20-experiment]] (сходство 0.11)
